hotel_name: Khách sạn Four Points by Sheraton Nha Trang (Four Points by Sheraton Nha Trang)

reviews.title: Bad service and room facility
reviews.text:
Despite receiving prior confirmation, the hotel failed to prepare the anniversary service I had requested. Furthermore, I found the service levels to be inadequate; the reception desk was frequently unattended after 10:00 PM, resulting in long wait times.

The room condition was also unsatisfactory. There was a noticeable bad smell, and the television is outdated and does not support streaming services like Netflix.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your constructive feedback. We sincerely apologize that your recent stay did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the service arrangements and room condition.
Please rest assured that your comments have been shared with the relevant team for immediate review and corrective action. We are committed to continuously improving our service standards and facilities to ensure a better experience for our guests.
Thank you for your valuable feedback, which greatly helps us in further improving the quality of our services. Should your travels bring you back to Nha Trang in the future, we sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide you with a much-improved experience.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest Room, 2 Twin, Ocean View

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: The room was clean and new but very cramped.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for your kind comment. We are pleased to know that you appreciated the cleanliness and new condition of the room. At the same time, we appreciate your feedback regarding the room layout. Your comments have been shared with our team as we continuously review our offerings to better match guest expectations.
We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you again in the future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen

reviews.room_type: Superior, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: If you value accommodation, this is the place.
reviews.text: There are many hotels in Vietnam that offer great value for money, but I personally consider the comfort of the bed very important, so I chose Four Points and paid a bit more. It was about 80,000 to 90,000 won per night, which is more expensive than local hotels in Vietnam, but the location was good, and it was comfortable and clean, so I really liked it. Right in front, there’s a delicious pho restaurant, and Kong Cafe is a 1-minute walk away, while Lotte Mart and the beach are just a 5-minute walk down the road. The market was also close, so I went there very often. The main city center is about a 15-minute walk, so I used a rickshaw to get around. I would love to stay there again next time.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for your wonderful review. We are truly delighted to know that you had such a comfortable and satisfying stay, appreciating the quality of our accommodations, our convenient location, and the overall cleanliness and comfort we strive to provide. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
reviews.room_type: Superior, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is new and clean, close to the center, and the staff is friendly.
reviews.response:

reviews.room_type: Superior, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: Realistic choice
reviews.text:
When visiting Nha Trang, I think you'll consider very affordable local hotels or global chain hotels and resorts. 

I believe it's possible to experience top hotel services at very reasonable prices. Don't risk getting a bad room in a local hotel just to save a little per night...

It may be a 4-star hotel lacking in amenities (since it's a Four Points...), but for the price, I think this is the best choice for thoroughly exploring the city and resting comfortably at the accommodation.

I have a very high intention of revisiting.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your wonderful review. We are delighted to know that you were satisfied with the overall value, comfort, and service during your stay. It is encouraging to hear that our hotel provided a pleasant place for you to relax while exploring the city.
Your intention to return truly means a lot to our team and motivates us to continue delivering the best possible experience. We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager

reviews.title: Satisfaction
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay for three nights without any discomfort. The location was great for getting around. Kong Cafe, Lotte Mart, and the beach are all close by. However, the popular areas like Wellsapana Night Market and the main city of CCCP, which often attract Koreans, require about a 10 to 15 minute walk, and since it's hot and humid, it's better to take a rickshaw. The cleaning was always neat, and the staff were friendly, which was nice.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for your wonderful review. We are truly delighted to know that you had a comfortable and enjoyable stay, appreciated our convenient location, well-maintained cleanliness, and the friendliness of our team.
We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
reviews.room_type: Superior, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: I liked this place the most during my trip to Nha Trang.
reviews.text:
It might be because it’s newly built, but it's quiet, neat, and clean, and the location is quite good. This is the most successful accommodation during my trip to Nha Trang, haha.

I recommend Korean people to go twice. I suggest the top floor.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for your wonderful review. We are truly delighted to know that you had such a satisfying experience with our property, from the comfort and cleanliness of our facilities to the overall atmosphere and convenient surroundings. It is especially rewarding to hear that your stay was one of the highlights of your trip.
We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest Room, 1 King, City View

reviews.title: Really highly recommended 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
reviews.text:
This is my third time in Nha Trang.  
I booked this trip with my mom, so I carefully looked through reviews and it’s the best! ♥️  
Each staff member was very kind, the location was great, and the room condition was perfect! In the evening, it was quiet, and it was possible to walk around the city.  
Lottemart is just a 5-minute walk away, and there's a Kong Cafe across the street, all within walking distance.  
I tend to be sensitive and have trouble sleeping while traveling, but I had great sleep for both nights! ♥️♥️👍🏻👍🏻  
It's a place I want to visit again.  
I highly recommend it! 😆
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share such a wonderful review. We are truly delighted to know that your stay was comfortable and that our service, accommodations, and surrounding area met your expectations during this trip.
It is especially rewarding for us to hear that our team’s service and the overall atmosphere contributed to a relaxing and pleasant experience. Your kind recognition is a great encouragement to our entire staff, and I will be sure to share your feedback with them.
We sincerely hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another memorable stay in Nha Trang in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest Room, 2 Twin, Ocean View

reviews.title: It's the best!
reviews.text:
Thank you for always responding quickly and kindly to inquiries and requests, which made the trip even more enjoyable 😊

Lotte Mart is just a 5-minute walk away, and the beach is also close, making it nice for leisurely walks. 
Being newly built, the facilities are clean, allowing us to stay comfortably.

I stayed with my mother, and she was also very satisfied.
The breakfast, although not abundant in variety, was delicious, with no unpleasant meat odor, and the cleanliness was excellent.

I am recommending this downtown resort to friends and colleagues who are planning a trip to Nha Trang 🥰

Thanks to Hamye in information and the lobby staff, we were able to check in comfortably and leave happily 😊
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for your wonderful review. We are truly delighted to know that you and your mother had such an enjoyable and comfortable stay. It is a pleasure to hear that our convenient location, well-maintained facilities, and attentive service contributed to making your trip even more pleasant.

We are especially pleased to hear your kind words about our team, especially Hamye from the front desk team and our lobby staff. Your compliments mean a great deal, and I will personally share your feedback with them to recognize their efforts.

We sincerely appreciate your recommendation to your friends and colleagues, and we truly look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
飯店新穎 乾淨舒適 餐廳非常漂亮 食物很美味 員工熱情友善 海景房真的讓人難忘
泳池非常棒 雖然距離海邊要走一小段路 但也相對安靜 晚上睡的非常好 非常推薦的飯店
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful review and for sharing such generous feedback about your stay with us. We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed so many aspects of your experience, from the comfort of your room and the memorable sea view to our dining experience and warm hospitality. It is especially rewarding to hear that you had a restful night’s sleep and would highly recommend our hotel. Your kind words mean a great deal to our entire team and inspire us to continue delivering exceptional service. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Tien Nguyen
General Manager
